    # rocket_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # jet_engines â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = jet_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = jet_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_improved_rocket_bomber
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_rocket_engines â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = improved_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = sp_rockets_dual_chamber_rocket_engine_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_rocket_engines â€” 1946
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_rocket_engines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_industry >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_industry_competence >= 85 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_rockets
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = advanced_rocket_engines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_AIR (9 techs) â”€â”€

# antiair_1915
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_1918
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair_1922
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antiair
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antiair5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_air
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_air_great_war = {
    # antiair_1915 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1915
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_1918 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1918
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair_1922 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair_1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair_1922
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antiair â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antiair5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antiair5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = antiair5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ANTI_TANK (11 techs) â”€â”€

# antitank_1915
#   year=1915 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_1918
#   year=1918 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank_1922
#   year=1922 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# mountain_tanks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_antitank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# antitank5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=anti_tank
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_great_war = {
    # antitank_1915 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1915
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_1918 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1918
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank_1922 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank_1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank_1922
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mountain_tanks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = mountain_tanks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_bofors_antitank_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_antitank â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antitank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antitank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # antitank5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = antitank5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }
        add_technology = antitank5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / ARTILLERY (30 techs) â”€â”€

# light_field_gun1
#   year=1900 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# heavy_field_gun1
#   year=1900 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha1
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha4
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery1
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery4
#   year=1910 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# heavy_field_gun2
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# light_field_gun2
#   year=1914 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha2
#   year=1915 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery2
#   year=1915 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery_global
#   year=1918 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# heavy_field_gun3
#   year=1922 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_artillery3
#   year=1922 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_heavy_artillery
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# bonus_bertha3
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# gw_artillery
#   year=1930 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# interwar_artillery
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# railway_gun
#   year=1936 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# basic_dp_light_battery
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery1
#   year=1939 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# improved_dp_light_battery
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery2
#   year=1940 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_shock_hardening_techniques
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery3
#   year=1941 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery4
#   year=1942 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# artillery5
#   year=1943 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# advanced_dp_light_battery
#   year=1944 branch=land category=artillery
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_artillery_great_war = {
    # light_field_gun1 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = light_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_field_gun1 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_field_gun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha1 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_bertha1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha4 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_bertha4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery1 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery4 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_field_gun2 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_field_gun2 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_field_gun2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = light_field_gun2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha2 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_bertha2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery2 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }

            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery_global }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery_global
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_field_gun3 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_field_gun3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = heavy_field_gun3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_artillery3 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_heavy_artillery â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_heavy_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_heavy_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # bonus_bertha3 â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bonus_bertha3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = bonus_bertha3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gw_artillery â€” 1930
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gw_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1930 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = gw_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # interwar_artillery â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_artillery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = interwar_artillery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # railway_gun â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = railway_gun }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = railway_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_dp_light_battery â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery1 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_rocket_assisted_projectiles_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery_purpose_built_gun_motor_carriages_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_dp_light_battery â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery2 â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_shock_hardening_techniques â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_shock_hardening_techniques }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_shock_hardening_techniques
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery3 â€” 1941

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_variable_time_fuze_shells â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_variable_time_fuze_shells
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery4 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # artillery5 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = artillery5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_dp_light_battery â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_dp_light_battery }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_dp_light_battery
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / HEAVY_TANKS (33 techs) â”€â”€

# ww1_heavy_tank
#   year=1916 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[tank_unlocker2]

# ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback
#   year=1916 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70 deps=[gwtank__nostepback, tank_unlocker2__nostepback]

# ww1_heavy_tank2
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_super_heavy_tank
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_super_heavy_tank__nostepback
#   year=1917 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank_interwar
#   year=1928 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_heavy_tank_interwar__nostepback
#   year=1928 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_td
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_art
#   year=1934 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_heavy_spaa

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1940 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

#   year=1943 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
#   year=1945 branch=land category=heavy_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_heavy_tanks_great_war = {
    # ww1_heavy_tank â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_tank2 â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_tank2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_super_heavy_tank â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_tank2__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_td â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_art â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_spaa â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_td â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_art â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_spaa â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # super_heavy_tank_chassis â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = super_heavy_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = super_heavy_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_lc_weapon_fire_control_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# advanced_infantry_weapons2
#   year=1945 branch=land category=infantry
#   min_tier=micro min_branch_score=0

arm_grant_land_infantry_great_war = {
    # infantry_weapons â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_binoculars â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_binoculars }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_binoculars
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_ambulance1 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_ambulance1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_ambulance1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1infantry_weapons1 â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1infantry_weapons1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_grenade â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_grenade }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_grenade
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = marines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_mountaineers â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_mountaineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_mountaineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_infantry_equip1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_infantry_equip1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_infantry_equip1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_gasmask â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_gasmask }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_gasmask
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # support_weapons2 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = support_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = support_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_ambulance2 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_ambulance2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_ambulance2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1infantry_weapons2 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1infantry_weapons2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1infantry_weapons2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_machinegun1 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_machinegun1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_machinegun1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_mortar1 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_mortar1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_mortar1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_infantry2_equip â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_infantry2_equip }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = ww1_infantry2_equip
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_flamethrower1 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_flamethrower1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_flamethrower1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # marines2 â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = marines2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }

# basic_light_tank
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_td
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_art
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_spaa
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# basic_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_td
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_art
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_spaa
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# improved_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1936 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_td
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_art
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_spaa
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# advanced_light_tank_chassis
#   year=1941 branch=land category=light_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_great_war = {
    # gwtank â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank__nostepback â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_2 â€” 1913
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1913 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback â€” 1913
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1913 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_2__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_3 â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback â€” 1916
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1916 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_3__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank_b â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_b }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank_b
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank__nostepback â€” 1917
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1917 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # gwtank_chassis â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_4 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank_interwar_1 â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_interwar_1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank_interwar_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_4__nostepback â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_4__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_4__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank_interwar_1__nostepback â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_interwar_1__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank_interwar_1__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank_interwar_2 â€” 1928
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_interwar_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank_interwar_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_tank_interwar_2__nostepback â€” 1928
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_tank_interwar_2__nostepback }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1928 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_tank_interwar_2__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_armored_car_5 â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_5 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_tank â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_td â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_art â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_light_spaa â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks

            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_armored_car_5__nostepback
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

# â”€â”€ LAND / MECHANISED (5 techs) â”€â”€

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry
#   year=1941 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry2
#   year=1943 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# mechanised_infantry3
#   year=1945 branch=land category=mechanised
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_mechanised_great_war = {
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_mechanized_infantry_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry2 â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # mechanised_infantry3 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_mechanised
        }
        add_technology = mechanised_infantry3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MEDIUM_TANKS (18 techs) â”€â”€

# basic_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1934 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_tank
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_td
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_art
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# basic_medium_spaa
#   year=1939 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank_chassis
#   year=1940 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# improved_medium_tank
#   year=1941 branch=land category=medium_tanks

# advanced_medium_td
#   year=1943 branch=land category=medium_tanks

# modern_td
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

# modern_spaa
#   year=1945 branch=land category=medium_tanks
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_land_medium_tanks_great_war = {
    # basic_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1934
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1934 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_tank â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_td â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_art â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_art
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_medium_spaa â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_medium_spaa }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_medium_spaa
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank_chassis â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_medium_tank â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_medium_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # improved_medium_td â€” 1941

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_td }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks

        add_technology = improved_medium_td
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # improved_medium_art â€” 1941

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_medium_art }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_medium_tanks
