# â”€â”€ LAND / MODERN_TANKS (2 techs) â”€â”€

# main_battle_tank
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# main_battle_tank_chassis
#   year=1945 branch=land category=modern_tanks
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_land_modern_tanks_great_war = {
    # main_battle_tank â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # main_battle_tank_chassis â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_modern_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = main_battle_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / MOTORISED (7 techs) â”€â”€

# motorised_infantry
#   year=1900 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# early_motorised
#   year=1914 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension1
#   year=1919 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension2
#   year=1921 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# infantry_ww1_suspension3
#   year=1927 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# tech_trucks
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

# motorised_infantry2
#   year=1936 branch=land category=motorised
#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_land_motorised_great_war = {
    # motorised_infantry â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_motorised â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_motorised }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = early_motorised
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_suspension1 â€” 1919
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_suspension1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1919 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_suspension2 â€” 1921
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_suspension2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1921 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # infantry_ww1_suspension3 â€” 1927
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_ww1_suspension3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1927 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = infantry_ww1_suspension3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_trucks â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_trucks }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = tech_trucks
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # motorised_infantry2 â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = motorised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_motorised
        }
        add_technology = motorised_infantry2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# tech_recon8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_military_police8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_field_hospital8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_logistics_company8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# tech_signal_company8
#   year=1945 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

# night_vision2
#   year=1946 branch=land category=support
#   min_tier=minor min_branch_score=15

arm_grant_land_support_great_war = {
    # tech_support â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_support }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_support
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_train â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = ww1_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_engineers
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_recon â€” 1910

            has_tech = motorised_infantry
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_field_hospital6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_logistics_company6 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_logistics_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_logistics_company6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_signal_company6 â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_signal_company6 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # wartime_train â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = wartime_train }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = wartime_train
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_engineers7 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_engineers7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # tech_recon7 â€” 1942

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

    }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }

            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = tech_signal_company8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # night_vision2 â€” 1946

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = night_vision2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1946 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 15 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_support
        }
        add_technology = night_vision2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

# â”€â”€ LAND / TANKS_GENERIC (31 techs) â”€â”€

#   year=1910 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# armored_car1
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# tech_maintenance_company2
#   year=1914 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

# tank_unlocker2
#   year=1915 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1915 branch=land category=tanks_generic

#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

#   year=1945 branch=land category=tanks_generic
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=35

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_great_war = {
    # tech_maintenance_company â€” 1910
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1910 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car1 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company2 â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_unlocker2 â€” 1915
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_unlocker2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1915 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tank_unlocker2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_unlocker2__nostepback â€” 1915

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_tech = gwtank__nostepback
            has_tech = tank_unlocker2__nostepback
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = sp_armored_advanced_flamethrower_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_3 â€” 1941
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1941 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # amphibious_tank_2 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = amphibious_tank_2 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = amphibious_tank_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car3 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car3 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armored_car_at_upgrade â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car_at_upgrade }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = armored_car_at_upgrade
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SWE_lynx_armored_car â€” 1942

            NOT = { has_tech = SWE_lynx_armored_car }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = SWE_lynx_armored_car
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company7 â€” 1942
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company7 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1942 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company7
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # armor_tech_4 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # engine_tech_4 â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_4 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_4
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tech_maintenance_company8 â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tech_maintenance_company8 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_land >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_land_competence >= 35 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }
        add_technology = tech_maintenance_company8
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_battleships_great_war = {
    # ww1_battleship0_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_battleship0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_battleship0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = heavy_navalmodule_1890_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_battleships
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_battlecruiser2_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # heavy_navalmodule_1914_mtg â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_navalmodule_1914_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

# â”€â”€ NAVAL / CARRIERS (18 techs) â”€â”€

# seaplane_carrier_mtg
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# seaplane_carrier
#   year=1914 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_carrier_mtg
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# ww1_carrier
#   year=1918 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier_mtg
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# early_carrier
#   year=1922 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier_mtg
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# basic_carrier
#   year=1936 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier_mtg
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# improved_carrier
#   year=1940 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_refined_pykrete
#   year=1942 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# sp_ice_composite_runawayas
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_ship_hull_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier_mtg
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

# advanced_carrier
#   year=1944 branch=naval category=carriers
#   min_tier=great_power min_branch_score=70

arm_grant_naval_carriers_great_war = {
    # seaplane_carrier_mtg â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = seaplane_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = seaplane_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # seaplane_carrier â€” 1914
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = seaplane_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1914 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = seaplane_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_carrier_mtg â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_carrier â€” 1918
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1918 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier_mtg â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_carrier â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = early_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier_mtg â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_carrier â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = basic_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier_mtg â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_carrier â€” 1940

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_carrier }

            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    # sp_refined_pykrete â€” 1942

            NOT = { has_tech = sp_refined_pykrete }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_refined_pykrete
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # sp_ice_composite_runawayas â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_ice_composite_runawayas }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_ice_composite_runawayas
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_carrier â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier_mtg â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_carrier â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_carrier }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 70 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   min_tier=minor_industrial min_branch_score=25

arm_grant_naval_destroyers_great_war = {
    # ww1_destroyer0_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_destroyer0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_destroyer0 â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_destroyer0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_destroyer1_mtg â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_destroyer1_mtg }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"

            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_destroyer â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = basic_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_sonar â€” 1939
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1939 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_ship_hull_light â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): advanced_depth_charges
    # improved_destroyer_mtg â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_destroyer â€” 1940
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1940 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = improved_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_sonar â€” 1943
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_sonar }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1943 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_sonar
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_ship_hull_light â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_ship_hull_light }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_ship_hull_light
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): modern_depth_charges
    # advanced_destroyer_mtg â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # advanced_destroyer â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_destroyer }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_destroyers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_destroyer
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

#   year=1944 branch=naval category=heavy_cruisers
#   min_tier=regional_power min_branch_score=45

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_great_war = {
    # ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_cruiser0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_cruiser0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = medium_navalmodule_1890_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_navalmodule_1890_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1890_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = light_navalmodule_1890_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_cruiser0 â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_cruiser0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_cruiser0 â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser0 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_cruiser0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # medium_navalmodule_1890 â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = medium_navalmodule_1890
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_navalmodule_1890 â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = light_navalmodule_1890
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_cruiser1_mtg â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser1_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_cruiser1_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_cruiser1_mtg â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser1_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_heavy_cruiser1_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # medium_navalmodule_1900_mtg â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = medium_navalmodule_1900_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = medium_navalmodule_1900_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # light_navalmodule_1900_mtg â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_navalmodule_1900_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = light_navalmodule_1900_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_light_cruiser1 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_light_cruiser1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = ww1_light_cruiser1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_heavy_cruiser1 â€” 1900
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_heavy_cruiser1 }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }

    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_light_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # early_heavy_cruiser â€” 1922
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1922 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # basic_ship_hull_cruiser â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_ship_hull_cruiser }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_ship_hull_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # improved_airplane_launcher â€” 1936

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_airplane_launcher }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1936 }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }

            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # SKIPPED (XP-gated): basic_cruiser_armor_scheme
    # basic_light_cruiser_mtg â€” 1936
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }

            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 45 }

            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser_mtg }

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_great_war = {
    # ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # ww1_moduleMTG_mines â€” 1890
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_moduleMTG_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1890 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = ww1_moduleMTG_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = mtg_tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_landing_craft_mtg â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_landing_craft_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # tank_landing_craft â€” 1944
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1944 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    # modern_naval_mines â€” 1945
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_naval_mines }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1945 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 20 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = modern_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = ww1_submarine0_mtg }
            check_variable = { arm_grant_counter < arm_quarterly_cap }
            check_variable = { arm_target_year_naval >= 1900 }
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index >= 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_naval_competence >= 25 }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = ww1_submarine0_mtg
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
